dispense.title: Dispense Medicine to Employee
dispense.description: Search employee, select disease, medicine group, and dispense medicine.

warehouse.title: Medicine Warehouse Management
warehouse.description: Manage import to warehouse and transfer medicine to factories.

bed.title: Hospital Bed Management
bed.description: Track hospital bed statuses and patient admission history.

earlyLeaving.title: Track Early Leaving Workers
earlyLeaving.description: Track and record early leaving of workers due to health reasons.

insurance.title: Social & Accident Insurance
insurance.description: Manage information on sickness benefits, maternity, and labor accidents.

maternity.title: Maternity Tracking
maternity.description: Register and track maternity, calculate leave dates and related benefits.

report.title: Clinic Reports
report.description: Export reports related to medicine dispensing, stock balances, and hospital beds.

masterData.title: Master Data Management
masterData.description: Manage categories of Medicines, Medicine Groups, Suppliers, and Diseases.
